name: LO Development — YouTube Gradual Upload (DRAFT, DISABLED)

meta.owner: Power Agent 4 — YouTube Upload n8n Automation (draft)
meta.purpose: Upload LO Development cutdown clips to Jeremy's YouTube gradually (5/day at 8:00 AM America/Los_Angeles) as UNLISTED drafts, skipping already-uploaded clips, with retry and status tracking. NOTHING is uploaded until Jeremy approves and the workflow is manually activated.
safety: active=false — workflow must NOT be activated without Jeremy's explicit approval.
privacyStatus is hard-coded to 'unlisted' on the upload node.
notifySubscribers is hard-coded to false on the upload node.
Batch is capped at 5 clips/run to stay well under the ~6/day practical YouTube upload limit and the 10,000 quota-unit/day cap (one resumable upload = ~1,600 units; 5 = ~8,000).
Credentials are placeholders ('REPLACE_*'); no real OAuth tokens are stored in this file.

credentialPlaceholders.googleDriveOAuth2Api: REPLACE_WITH_JEREMY_GOOGLE_DRIVE_OAUTH2_CREDENTIAL (scope: https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly) — only needed if pulling source mp4 from Drive instead of local n8n binary.

nodes.name: Daily 8:00 AM Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires once per day at 08:00. Set the n8n instance timezone to America/Los_Angeles so 8 AM is Pacific. DISABLED until workflow is activated.

nodes.name: Read Upload Queue Manifest
nodes.notes: Reads the 91-clip queue. Replace the file read with whatever store Jeremy chooses (committed JSON, Google Sheet, Supabase table). Keep the field shape identical to upload-queue-manifest.json.

nodes.name: Keep Only Not-Yet-Uploaded
nodes.notes: Skip-already-uploaded logic: only clips with queueStatus='pending' AND an empty youtubeVideoId pass. Idempotent — re-running the same day never re-uploads a finished clip.

nodes.name: Limit Daily Batch (5)
nodes.notes: Quota guard: at most 5 clips/run. 5 resumable uploads ~= 8,000 quota units, under the 10,000/day cap, and under the ~6/day practical upload limit. At 5/day the full 91-clip library finishes in ~19 calendar days.

nodes.name: YouTube Upload (UNLISTED)
nodes.notes: privacyStatus=unlisted and notifySubscribers=false are NON-NEGOTIABLE. categoryId 27 = Education. The mp4 binary must be supplied on the 'data' property — add an upstream 'Read Binary File' or 'Google Drive: Download' node that resolves $json.localFileName / $json.driveFileLink before this node when wiring the real run. continueOnFail lets one bad file be caught by the failure branch instead of stopping the batch.

nodes.name: Did Upload Fail?
nodes.notes: Splits the success path from the failure path. Items with an 'error' field are routed to the retry/record-failure branch.

nodes.name: Record Success (status patch)
nodes.notes: Produces a status patch keyed by clipId. Persist this back to the manifest store (committed JSON via PR, Google Sheet, or Supabase). The patch only ever sets 'uploaded' when a real videoId exists.

nodes.name: Record Failure / Retry Decision
nodes.notes: Failure-retry: clips stay 'pending' (auto-retried next run) until 3 attempts, then 'needs_review'. Persist the same way as the success patch.

nodes.name: Build Run Report (no send)
nodes.notes: Aggregates success + failure into one report object. Intentionally does NOT send anything outbound.
